parameters.name: after

schema.description: Cursor for pagination - ID of the last item from previous page
schema.title: After

parameters.description: Cursor for pagination - ID of the last item from previous page

delete.description: Delete specific checkpoints for a model.
Delete a model, all its checkpoints, artifacts, and the associated W&B run.

post.description: Create a new RL (Reinforcement Learning) training job.
Create a new SFT (Supervised Fine-Tuning) training job.

get.description: Get a training job by ID.
Get events for a training job.

Check health of all system components.

Returns:
    JSON with status of:
    - api: Always true (if endpoint is reachable)
    - database: Whether DB connection works
    - cpu_queue: Success, duration, and any errors
    - gpu_queue: Success, duration, and any errors

Returns HTTP 503 if any checks fail.

EasyInputMessage.title: EasyInputMessage

A message input to the model with a role indicating instruction following
hierarchy. Instructions given with the `developer` or `system` role take
precedence over instructions given with the `user` role. Messages with the
`assistant` role are presumed to have been generated by the model in previous
interactions.

EasyInputMessageParam.title: EasyInputMessageParam

A message input to the model with a role indicating instruction following
hierarchy. Instructions given with the `developer` or `system` role take
precedence over instructions given with the `user` role. Messages with the
`assistant` role are presumed to have been generated by the model in previous
interactions.

ToolChoiceMcp.description: Use this option to force the model to call a specific tool on a remote MCP server.

ToolChoiceShell.title: ToolChoiceShell
ToolChoiceShell.description: Forces the model to call the shell tool when a tool call is required.

ToolChoiceTypes.title: ToolChoiceTypes
ToolChoiceTypes.description:
Indicates that the model should use a built-in tool to generate a response.
[Learn more about built-in tools](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/tools).

ToolReferenceBlockParam.title: ToolReferenceBlockParam
ToolReferenceBlockParam.description: Tool reference block that can be included in tool_result content.

Trajectory.title: Trajectory
Trajectory.description: Preserve trajectory fields added by newer ART producers.

TrajectoryGroup.title: TrajectoryGroup

UserLocation.title: UserLocation
UserLocation.description: The approximate location of the user.

WebFetchTool20260309Param.title: WebFetchTool20260309Param

WebSearchPreviewTool.title: WebSearchPreviewTool
